items.title: Spirit Airlines shutting down after rescue talks collapse
items.dek: The airline had been in talks with the Trump administration about a $500m bailout.
items.body: The airline had been in talks with the Trump administration about a $500m bailout.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'If we sleep they bite': Rats and weasels infest camps for displaced Gazans
items.dek: In the Gaza Strip, the daily battles are now with rats, weasels, and other pests spreading diseases.
items.body: In the Gaza Strip, the daily battles are now with rats, weasels, and other pests spreading diseases.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'This tree was planted by my ancestor hundreds of years ago and my family settled here'
items.dek: Oral history traces a family's roots to a tree planted in the 13th Century in a Ghanaian fishing town.
items.body: Oral history traces a family's roots to a tree planted in the 13th Century in a Ghanaian fishing town.
